subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto her who hath believed in her Lord and was among the devoted ones, in a mighty Tablet, when the sun shone forth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا للتی آمنت بربها و کانت من القانتات فی لوح عظیم اذا اشرقت شمس
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @love of God, @chastisement and requital, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
